name: json-ai
description: Json Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: validate_json
tools.description: Validate JSON and report structure details.

tools.name: transform_json
tools.description: Transform JSON. Operations: sort_keys, minify, prettify, remove_nulls, add_field, remove_field, get_path.

tools.name: diff_json
tools.description: Compare two JSON objects and find differences.

tools.name: flatten_json
tools.description: Flatten nested JSON to single-level with dot-notation keys.
